summaryPatterns: I'm a C++ developer with 3+ years of experience in high-performance systems, built microservices handling 10K+ RPS and improved system performance by 30%
I'm a Senior C++ engineer (5+ years) specializing in financial systems and blockchain, optimized transaction processing to support 200K+ RPS with 38% latency reduction
I'm a C++ backend developer (3+ years) focused on distributed systems, migrated monolith to microservices and reduced critical scenario execution time from 9 to 3 seconds
I'm an experienced C++ developer (10+ years) in fintech and gaming, built high-frequency trading systems and game engines serving millions of users
achievementPhrases: Improved system performance by 30% through architecture optimization
Built services handling 10K+ requests per second
Reduced critical scenario execution time from 9 to 3 seconds
Optimized transaction processing to support 200K+ RPS
Decreased latency by 38% using zero-copy and lock-free structures
Reduced interface response time by 25% for filtering and sorting
Cut application startup time from 8 to 3 seconds
Decreased memory consumption by 35% through container optimization
Reduced server requests by 40% via client-side caching
Accelerated JSON parsing by 3x through library migration
Improved security by 85% by eliminating critical authorization vulnerability
Increased development speed by 30% through ORM implementation
Reduced incident response time by 40% with monitoring setup
Accelerated deployment by 20% through CI/CD implementation
Built P2P layer supporting 100K+ concurrent connections
Optimized cryptographic operations reducing latency by 45%
Increased FPS by 20-30% through rendering optimization
Reduced configuration size by 30% through ACL cleanup
keyResponsibilities: Developing and maintaining high-performance C++ applications and services
Optimizing system performance and reducing latency
Integrating with databases and message queues
Setting up CI/CD pipelines and containerization
Conducting code reviews and maintaining code quality
Troubleshooting production issues and performance tuning
Writing unit tests and ensuring system reliability
redFlags: Listing generic achievements without specific metrics
Providing vague experience descriptions without quantifiable results
Missing concrete examples of performance improvements
Not specifying C++ standards used (C++17, C++20, etc)
Lack of system design or architecture experience for senior roles
No mention of testing, debugging, or code quality practices
notes: C++ Backend разработчики в России работают преимущественно в финтех, кибербезопасности, телекоме и игровой индустрии. Ключевые требования: глубокое знание современных стандартов C++ (17/20/23), опыт с высоконагруженными системами, микросервисной архитектурой, базами данных (PostgreSQL, Redis), контейнеризацией и CI/CD. Важны конкретные метрики производительности (RPS, latency, memory usage). Многие работают с криптографией, сетевыми протоколами, embedded системами. Senior разработчики часто имеют опыт архитектурного проектирования, оптимизации производительности и работы с legacy кодом. Популярны навыки Go, Python как дополнительные языки. Обязательно указание конкретных достижений с цифрами - снижение latency, увеличение throughput, оптимизация памяти.
